title: salvia pratensis var. bullata
intro: Salvia pratensis var. bullata, also known as the clustered purple sage, is a variety of the perennial herb Salvia pratensis that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds like rosmarinic acid and ursolic acid. The health benefits of Salvia pratensis var. bullata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
